gifts.description: Welcome to the game! Here is a special gift pack to help you start or continue your journey. Thank you for your support!
gifts.rewardLabel: 5e4 Gold, 5e3 Jade, 1.5e4 Qi Stones, 17 Herbs, 10 Pills, 1 Custom Artifact

customArtifacts.name: Larping artifacts
customArtifacts.description: An artifact built 67 years ago, it was built in hand by triple t sahur using salt and sugar
